prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为约19521名→18420名→17572名→22625名→23127名。2021–2023年呈逐年上升趋势（位次数字缩小），但2024年出现跳升（ 位次数字大幅增大），从17572名后移至22625名，2025年继续后移至23127名，近两年累计后移约5555名，显示报考热度有所降温；该校在浙江省综合类招生计 划2021年66人、2022年64人、2023年69人、2024年70人、2025年72人，呈逐年小幅递增趋势。2026年计划招生78人，较2025年增加6人（扩招约8.3%），扩招幅度为近 年最大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第88名，近年排名稳定在86–102名区间，属于中上水平2 11院校；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要因理学院教师被指性骚扰学生事件；2026年声誉数据中未出现该校，舆情影响已基本消退。抖音综合热 度总排名第90位（评价为一般），短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学为该校传统优势方向。招生 专业中药学类（含药学、药物制剂等）、中药学类、临床药学、生物制药等均直接对应药学A+学科，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医药类专业社会热度持续较高 ，药学、临床药学等方向就业前景良好。浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约400,000人，较2025年（290,790人）大幅增加约37.5%，竞争显著加剧。；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，与浙江省为邻省，交通便利，对浙江考生有天然的地缘吸引力。该校在浙江省招生人数占 比较小（2025年约72人），但近年持续扩招，体现对浙江生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年扩招6人（缓解竞争）、浙江省考生总数大幅增加 约37.5%（加剧竞争）以及医药类专业持续热度，判断2026年最低位次在2025年23127名基础上继续后移。扩招与考生增加两因素对冲后，竞争略加剧，预测最低位次约24483名， 区间23983–24983名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间23983–24983名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（生物制药、临床药学等），一档拔尖创新班专业可作为冲刺目标（需位次明显优于区间上限），三档专业（药学 类、中药学类、化工与制药类）作为稳妥保底。位次优于23983名可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Zhejiang comprehensive category were approximately 19521 → 18420 → 17572 → 22625 → 23127. From 2021 to 2023, there was a year-on-year upward trend (ranking numbers decreased), but in 2024 there was a jump (ranking numbers increased significantly), moving from 17572 to 22625, and in 2025 further moved to 23127, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5555 positions in the last two years, indicating a cooling of application enthusiasm. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang comprehensive category was 66 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 72 in 2025, showing a slight year-on-year increase. The 2026 plan is to enroll 78 students, an increase of 6 from 2025 (an expansion of about 8.3%), the largest expansion in recent years, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 88th, with recent rankings stable in the 86–102 range, placing it among mid-to-high level 211 institutions. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to an incident where a teacher from the School of Science was accused of sexual harassment of students. In the 2026 reputation data, the university did not appear, indicating that the impact of public opinion has largely subsided. The overall popularity on Douyin ranks 90th (rated as average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Chinese Materia Medica is a traditional advantageous direction for the university. Enrollment majors such as Pharmacy (including Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, etc.), Chinese Materia Medica, Clinical Pharmacy, and Biopharmaceuticals directly correspond to the A+ Pharmacy discipline, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of medical and pharmaceutical majors remains high, with good employment prospects in directions like Pharmacy and Clinical Pharmacy. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% compared to 2025 (290,790), intensifying competition. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a neighboring province to Zhejiang, with convenient transportation, naturally attracting Zhejiang candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is relatively small (about 72 in 2025), but it has been continuously expanding in recent years, reflecting its emphasis on Zhejiang students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings over the past two years, the expansion of 6 students in 2026 (alleviating competition), the substantial increase of about 37.5% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (intensifying competition), and the sustained popularity of medical and pharmaceutical majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 23127. After offsetting the effects of expansion and candidate increase, competition slightly intensifies, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 24483, in the range of 23983–24983.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23983–24983, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Biopharmaceuticals, Clinical Pharmacy, etc.) as the main direction. Tier 1 top innovation class majors can be used as sprint targets (requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range). Tier 3 majors (Pharmacy, Chinese Materia Medica, Chemical and Pharmaceutical) serve as safe backups. If your ranking is better than 23983, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
